name: Alpha One Inc.
business: Alpha One Inc. provides telecommunications infrastructure services and intelligent products, primarily through its subsidiary Shenzhen Zhongyun Communication Technology Co., Ltd., which builds, installs, and maintains communication networks including 4G/5G base stations, fiber-optic cables, and wireless networks. The company also offers digital solutions for project management and sells intelligent products to telecommunications operators and equipment manufacturers.

exposures.sentence: building, installing, and maintaining complex communication networks, including base stations for 4G and 5G infrastructure, fiber-optic cable installation, and wireless network deployment.
We also provide advanced solutions for transmission network development, data center (IDC) construction, and core network optimization.

tamClaims.claim: The telecommunications infrastructure market in China was valued at approximately $31.62 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: The telecommunications infrastructure market in China was valued at approximately $31.62 billion in 2024 (https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/china-telecom-network-infrastructure-market-evaluation-ioxnf/), reflecting its vast scale and robust growth trajectory.

tamClaims.claim: This figure is expected to grow at a CAGR of 14.49% from 2024 to 2031.
tamClaims.sentence: This figure is expected to grow significantly, to a projected strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14.49% over the period from 2024 to 2031 driven by China's ambitious plans to expand its 5G network and fiber-optic infrastructure.

tamClaims.claim: The global telecom network infrastructure market was $94.1 billion in 2023, projected to reach $100.52 billion in 2024 at a CAGR of 6.8%, and $130.72 billion by 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: It is projected to increase from $94.1 billion in 2023 to $100.52 billion in 2024, achieving a CAGR of 6.8%. In 2028, it is expected to continue its strong growth trajectory, reaching $130.72 billion with the same CAGR.
